stemHtml: Wake turbulence Separation – departing aircraft – A minimum separation of at least 2 minutes shall be applied between a LIGHT or MEDIUM aircraft and a HEAVY aircraft taking-off behind, using parallel runways...

options.b: having a downslope of more than 1.5 degrees in the direction of departure.
options.c: having an upslope of more than 1.5 degrees in the direction of departure.
